description: Behavioral or layout modifier that narrows a property/anatomy without being a state, variant, or position.

values.label: Stacked
values.description: Layout arranged in a stacked (vertical) configuration

values.label: Multiline
values.description: Content spanning more than one line

values.label: Has stepper
values.description: Configuration where the in-field stepper buttons are shown; inverse of the hideStepper component option.
